since_last: 8% of 100 AI names green; Data Center, Power & Energy leads -1.22%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 8% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.51% · BTC -1.39% · Gold +0.38% · Nasdaq100 -1.62%. 8% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. Data Center, Power & Energy is doing the heavy lifting at -1.22%.

cards.headline: Data Center, Power & Energy leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Data Center, Power & Energy at -1.22%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -3.59%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ISRG is the standout at -10.89%
cards.body: Leaders: SO +1.75%, D +0.66%, PEG +0.49%, MGNI +0.20%, DLR +0.12%. Laggards: ISRG -10.89%, SYNA -5.66%, AMAT -5.51%, LRCX -4.81%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -3.92% at $125.97
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -3.92% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
